title: CHPM2030 Deliverable D1.4: Conceptual framework for orebody-EGS
author: Szanyi, János
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document provides a summary of outcomes from Task 1.1 – 1.3. A methodological framework is created, which will be used as a guide for the laboratory measurements in WP2. In this report, there is also a framework for data collection for modelling heat transport. A review of currently existing reservoir enhancement technologies is also provided. Collecting, evaluating, and defining critical success factors during the establishment of a CHPM facility were in the focus.
steps_raw: This document provides a summary of outcomes from Task 1.1 – 1.3. A methodological framework is created, which will be used as a guide for the laboratory measurements in WP2. Collecting, evaluating, and defining critical success factors during the establishment of a CHPM facility were in the focus.
